prompt: Node.js orders API PR: fetches all orders for a user in a loop (N+1), missing auth check (IDOR), floating point for currency

assertions.text: Review identifies the N+1 query pattern in the order_items fetch loop
Review flags that any user can access any other user's orders (IDOR / broken access control)
Review flags floating point arithmetic for monetary values
Findings reference specific line numbers from the diff
